name: API5IV
comments: Intravenous apixaban was formulated as a 2.5-mg mL-1 sterile, non-pyrogenic solution  and administered peripherally as a bolus injection given over approximately 10 s,

name: API10PO
comments: Oral apixaban was administered as a single 10-mg tablet under fasting conditions along with 240 mL of water.

comments: Although there are two administrations at different times, they are analyzed together

comments: Although there are two administrations at different times, they are analyzed together
